name: @orbs-network/spot
description: **A DeFi protocol for noncustodial advanced order types on EVM chains.**
author: danielz@orbs.com

scripts.build: npm run sync && forge build --extra-output-files abi
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run fmt && npm run build && npm run test
scripts.postpublish: npm publish -w skill && npm pack -w skill
